title: Software Engineer - Mobile
requiredSkills: State management libraries (e.g., Redux Toolkit, MobX, or Context API)
preferredSkills: Modern native UI frameworks (e.g., SwiftUI or Jetpack Compose)
keyResponsibilities: Lead the development, testing, and deployment of new features for our mobile application
Design and implement robust, scalable, and maintainable application architecture
Develop, integrate, and maintain custom native modules (iOS/Android) to extend React Native capabilities
Work closely with product managers, UX/UI designers, and backend engineers
Provide technical guidance and mentorship to junior team members
